comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Love turning on SELinux...

looks like it still needs to be turned off for now :/  the tests were failing because of SELinux

> @giuseppe Do you know why?

I'll check it out, one thing I've noticed is that `crun` has the wrong label on Fedora 30 at least:

```
$ ls -Z /usr/bin/crun /usr/bin/runc
                   system_u:object_r:bin_t:s0 /usr/bin/crun
system_u:object_r:container_runtime_exec_t:s0 /usr/bin/runc
```
/hold cancel
I've opened a PR for container-selinux: https://github.com/containers/container-selinux/pull/76
FYI - if that gets into an updates-testing repo, then rolling new VM images in this repo will scoop it up for use.  Ping me if you need help with that.
